name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V9.0 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 55 skills, 34 agents, 42 MCP tools, 33 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V9.0 completes the trust-completeness pass: all 42 MCP tools declare full risk metadata (readOnlyHint, destructiveHint, idempotentHint, openWorldHint); destructive-command policy lives in a single _shared/safety-policy.json source loaded by both the hook and the builder agent; PostToolUse evidence-ledger hook gives claim_check real signal across every tool call; new CONTRIBUTING.md guides external contributors through the source → regenerate → validate flow.
